# Worker Rights CN

> 面向中国大陆普通劳动者的开源权益助手，帮助整理事实、保存证据、估算金额和准备草稿。

- Website: https://90le.github.io/worker-rights-cn/
- Repository: https://github.com/90le/worker-rights-cn
- License: Apache-2.0
- Privacy: https://90le.github.io/worker-rights-cn/privacy.html
- Terms: https://90le.github.io/worker-rights-cn/terms.html
- Security: https://90le.github.io/worker-rights-cn/security.html

This project is not a lawyer, law firm, government service, or substitute for licensed legal advice. It does not guarantee case outcomes.
